allow: Bash(mysql -u root -pHenkanRoot apneapp -e "SELECT user_id, username, email FROM Users WHERE email='elsikubios@gmail.com';")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/utils/database.js'\).then\(m => m.default.query\('SELECT user_id, username, email FROM Users WHERE email=\\"elsikubios@gmail.com\\"'\).then\(\([r]\)=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/utils/database.js'\).then\(m => m.default.query\('SELECT user_id, username, email, created_at FROM Users'\).then\(\([r]\)=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e\)\)\)")
